subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-04-21
subcodes.first_line: The glory of the world of humanity is not through the body. This is the honor of the animal world; but the glory of man comes through the spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual transformation, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @East and West; communication between East and West, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
